title: Data packet registration infrastructure (RegisterPayloadHandlersEvent + PayloadRegistrar + CustomPacketPayload)
reference_files: C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1936-1960 (Network sync overview, packet types, PayloadRegistrar requirement)
acceptance_criteria: ModularShootPackets class exists with RegisterPayloadHandlersEvent listener on mod event bus
PayloadRegistrar configured with protocol version (matching mod version)
CustomPacketPayload.Type<T> constants defined for all M4 packets: BulletS2CPacket, BulletHitS2CPacket, GunSyncS2CPacket, ShootC2SPacket, ShootAnimS2CPacket
Each packet type has a ResourceLocation ID under 'modularshoot' namespace
Registration uses play() phase (not configuration) for gameplay packets
Packet handler stubs registered (playToServer / playToClient) with empty handlers to be filled by subsequent tasks
